description.value:
Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: Character is engulfed in intense flames. Take [[/damage 8 type=fire]] damage at the beginning of each of your turns. All actions: Add 1 to die results. Recovery: Use 1 [Action] to drop and roll: Make [[/save type=reflex]]

  • 1 success: Reduce condition to Ignited
  • 2 successes: Remove all fire conditions

Ally assistance: Ally can use 1 [Action]: Make [[/save type=reflex]]

  • 1 success: Reduce condition to Ignited
  • 2 successes: Remove all fire conditions

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=reflex]] to recover from Burning
